figures.caption: Figure 5: EDMD matrices for the Duffing oscillator with various permutations. (a) Randomly permuted. (b) Lexicographic order. (c) PR-ordered. (d) PPR-ordered.

Figure 6: Van der Pol oscillator. (a) One-step errors. The curves represent mean±1SD over 20 random seeds. The tunable symmetric subspace decomposition (TSSD) detects only 7 sizes: 3, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28 and 51. (b) 20-step state predictions with 6 observables.
Figure 7: EDMD matrices for the Van der Pol oscillator with various permutations. (a) Randomly permuted. (b) Lexicographic order. (c) PR-ordered. (d) PPR-ordered.
